chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Appeal No. S- 85 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.02.2026 For orders on MA 1498/26 Mr. Noorul Amin Sipio, Advocate for appellants Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Appellants Abdul Hameed and Muhammad Saleem were nominated accused in FIR No. 51 of 2021 registered under Section 302 & 34 PPC at Police Check Post Nasim Nagar PS Qasimabad Hyderabad. On 4.11.2025 both the appellants were convicted for offence punishable under Section 302- B PPC and sentenced to suffer life imprisonment as well as to pay compensation of Rs. 1,00,000/-. The accused filed an Appeal against that Decision. During pendency of this Appeal, the parties have reached a compromise and filed such application. The documents were sent to the learned trial court to conduct an inquiry. The learned trial court has held that the compromise is genuine. Learned APG has also gone through the report of the learned trial court and is of the view that there appears to be no impediment in accepting the compromise. I have also gone through the case and observed that Section 302 PPC is compoundable offence. The parties have entered into a compromise and compounded the offence. There is no minor for which diyat has to be deposited. Accordingly the application under Section 345(v) Cr.P.C. is allowed. The appellants are acquitted under Section 345(vi) Cr.P.C. They shall be released forthwith if not required in any other custody case. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
